zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucienne de Saint Saëns於0962年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉薩艾斯時，她的父親Rigobert Ier dit le Borgne de Saint-Saens31歲，母親Lucille de Domart26歲。她和Clotaire II de Foucarmont至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆澤納爾朋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucienne de Saint Saëns于0962年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉薩艾斯时，她的父亲Rigobert Ier dit le Borgne de Saint-Saens31岁，母亲Lucille de Domart26岁。她和Clotaire II de Foucarmont至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆澤納爾朋特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Saint
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Cyr, Remy.

English and French: nickname for a particularly pious individual, from Old French and Middle English saint(e), seint(e) ‘holy’ (from Latin sanctus ‘blameless, holy’). The vocabulary word was occasionally used in the Middle Ages as a personal name and this may have given rise to some instances of the surname.
English: perhaps a nickname for someone who wore, made, or sold girdles, from Middle English ceint, seint, saint ‘girdle’ (Old French ceint, Latin cinctum). Compare Center .

variants.name: Center
meanings: English and Scottish (Aberdeenshire): metonymic occupational name from Middle English, Old French ceinture, seinture ‘girdle’, denoting someone who made or sold girdles, or perhaps a nickname for someone who wore a distinctive girdle.
English: variant of   Senter   1.
Americanized form of German   Zehnder   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Sant
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Krishan, Anagha, Anjali, Arvind, Deepak, Milind, Nilima, Ravindra, Sanjeev, Sanjiv, Vasudev.
English (Cheshire and Staffordshire): variant of   Saint  .
Italian (northeastern): variant of   Santo  .

variants.name: Sante
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Luc, Camille, Lucien.  Spanish Alejandro, Anselmo, Carlos, Emilio, Jesusa, Jorge.
French (also Santé): probably a nickname for a healthy person, from French santé ‘good health’.

Galician, Asturian-Leonese, and Spanish (southwestern): habitational name from one of several places called Sante, in Galicia, Portugal, and Asturias, from a Visigothic personal name. This surname is also found in the Philippines.

nameMeanings.name: Saëns
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Leonie, Prosper.  German Aloys, Kurt.
Flemish: patronymic from Soen, from a variant of zoon ‘son’, used as a distinguishing epithet for a son who shared the same personal name as his father.

nameMeanings.name: Lucienne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Lucien  , also used occasionally in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Lucien
meanings: From Latin Lucianus, a derivative of the Roman given name Lucius, which is probably derived from lux ‘light’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucienne de Saint Saëns was born in 0962, in Saint-Saëns, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Rigobert Ier dit le Borgne de Saint-Saens, was 31 and her mother, Lucille de Domart, was 26. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Clotaire II de Foucarmont. She died in Senarpont, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucienne de Saint Saëns est née en 0962, à Saint-Saëns, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Rigobert Ier dit le Borgne de Saint-Saens, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lucille de Domart, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Clotaire II de Foucarmont. Elle est décédée à Senarpont, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucienne de Saint Saëns 0962 in Saint-Saëns, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rigobert Ier dit le Borgne de Saint-Saens 31 und ihre Mutter Lucille de Domart 26. Sie hatte mit Clotaire II de Foucarmont mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in Senarpont, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucienne de Saint Saëns è nata il nel 0962 nel Saint-Saëns, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Rigobert Ier dit le Borgne de Saint-Saens, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Lucille de Domart, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Clotaire II de Foucarmont. Morì nel Senarpont, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucienne de Saint Saënsが0962年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメサイント-サeンスで生まれた時，父Rigobert Ier dit le Borgne de Saint-Saensは31歳，母Lucille de Domartは26歳であった。彼女はClotaire II de Foucarmontとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女はフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメセナルプオントで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucienne de Saint Saëns(이)가 0962년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 세인트-사e스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rigobert Ier dit le Borgne de Saint-Saens(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucille de Domart(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Clotaire II de Foucarmont(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 센아르폰트에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucienne de Saint Saëns nasceu em 0962, em Saint-Saëns, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Rigobert Ier dit le Borgne de Saint-Saens, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lucille de Domart, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Clotaire II de Foucarmont. Ela faleceu em Senarpont, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucienne de Saint Saëns родилась в 0962 г. в местности сеинт-саeнс, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Rigobert Ier dit le Borgne de Saint-Saens было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lucille de Domart, 26. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Clotaire II de Foucarmont. Она умерла в местности сенарпонт, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucienne de Saint Saëns nació en 0962, en Saint-Saëns, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Rigobert Ier dit le Borgne de Saint-Saens, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lucille de Domart, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Clotaire II de Foucarmont. Murió en Senarpont, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia.
